summary: Primary tooth caries susceptibility varies; second molars are most susceptible because they have thinning weaker enamel when fully erupted but benefitting from being protected longer before full mineralization completes while canines face fewer challenges given better positioning among neighboring structures reducing overall risk factors significantly more so relative others mentioned
